# PHASEDistanceModelParameters

**Class**

A base class for a sound’s rate of change over distance.

## Declaration

```swift
class PHASEDistanceModelParameters
```

## Overview

When your app outputs sound with a 3D position and orientation, designate a subclass of this class to indicate the manner in which PHASE changes sound with distance. Assign an instance of either [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEGeometricSpreadingDistanceModelParameters] or [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEnvelopeDistanceModelParameters], depending on your app’s needs, to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition] class’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition/distanceModelParameters] property.

## Fading the Sound

- **fadeOutParameters**: A distance over which the framework fades out the mixer’s sound.

## Distance Modeling

- **PHASEGeometricSpreadingDistanceModelParameters**: An object that dissipates sound frequencies over distance.
- **PHASEEnvelopeDistanceModelParameters**: A graph of points and curves that shapes the volume of a sound over distance.
- **PHASEDistanceModelFadeOutParameters**: A distance over which the framework fades out sound.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Inherited By

- PHASEEnvelopeDistanceModelParameters
- PHASEGeometricSpreadingDistanceModelParameters

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
